title: polygala peruviana
intro: Polygala peruviana, also known as King's Gold or Yellow Falls, is a type of flowering plant native to South America. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Polygala peruviana is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
